reason: In-vitro evaluation of antimicrobial and antivirulent potential of a Sardinian plant essential oil; it does not report AMR surveillance or resistance evidence from Sardinian organisms, people, animals or environment.
Primary-care antibiotic-use study protocol only; no collected outcome data or AMR observation is reported.
Tests antifungal activity of plant oil macerates against clinical Candida isolates; it is not a Sardinian AMR surveillance or susceptibility dataset.
Southern Sardinia invasive meningococcal outbreak report; antimicrobial susceptibility testing was a method, but no interpretable AMR outcome is reported for the public AMR atlas.
Northern Sardinia paediatric tuberculosis clinical-characteristics study; the available abstract does not report an AMR outcome usable in the atlas.
Italian Streptococcus suis genetic-diversity study with one Sardinian human isolate; it does not report an AMR result and cannot support a Sardinian AMR evidence record.
